TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Uhuru Kenyatta Mntucing hngkawas 1961 idas 10 jiyax 26 ka Uhuru Kenyatta ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Kenya ta sayang o kiya ka Uhuru Kenyatta, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 4 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Uhuru Kenyatta = Kndusan Uhuru Kenyatta ka laqi na Kenya muwaya balay tu1 pnrdingan phiyu qnlhangan soto Jomo Kenyatta. Hangan niya Uhuru mniq kcka kari Kiswahili dungus niya ka 'Mtrawah', smatang spuda hiya madas rdax mtrawah hiti quri qnlhangan. Uhuru Kenyatta mnniq Nairobi na Pyasan Tukcka Saint Mary muya, lngkawas 1979 dhuq kngkawas 1980 mniq qmpah Kenya Sangyey Ginghang. Snpeyyah mnhdu muyas pyasan tukcka daw, wada mquri Amirika Pyasan Tubeyhing Amherst College muyas smluhay keyjay, seyji mi seyhu swey. Snpeyyah mnhdu muyas pyasan Tubeyhing Amherst College tbrinah miyah Kenya, wada phiyu cuko pnyahan pnwalang na kojyo Wilham Kenya Limited. Kngkawas 2002 cida, rmirih ccngtang Kenya Afrika Minjoku Ryeynmong muda seyngkyo soto mi wada ini baka, mhdu Kenya Afrika Minjoku Ryeynmong qnbsyaqan 40 knkawas qmlahang qnlhangan. Kngkawas 2005 prading, ngalan Kenya Afrika Minjoku Ryeynmong cusi. Uhuru Kenyatta u wada hliyan mniq iyax kngkawas 2007 seyngkyo soto cida, dmudul kngkawas 2007-2008 Kenya Qnrqilan, qnrqilan niyi u ya bay 1300 hiyi sediq ka wada mhuqil, beytaq so ini pndungus psbalay ka qcahur minjoku Kenya. Kngkawas 2014das 12, Kwoci Sings Hoying u wada malax pquri Uhuru Kenyatta Kngkawas 2014 idas 12, Kwoci Sings Hoying u wada malax pquri Uhuru Kenyatta na hmili Cumi Tbrinah Ssediq. Kwoci Sings Hoying keynsakwan Fatubensoda mniq kcka 1patas rmngaw, seyhu Kenya ini sruwa psupu qmpah wada madas 'Krinah Mqriqu' ka uuda niyi. Pkla kari ka hiya, nasi niqan knou cngcyu ka pcriyu pa, rngiyun niya ka biyax muda mntxan tmiyu kokoso dungan. Kngkawas 2013 idas 3 cida, Uhuru Kenyatta u wada mbiyax mangal 50.07% hyo niya mi wada na ini baka ka pnsung hiya Raila Odingga, wada mntu4 soto Kenya ka Uhuru Kenyatta.
S.PHON: uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas ** …üijax ** ka uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan k…ônja ta sajaŇč o kija ka uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta = kndusan uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta ka laqi na k…ônja muwaja balaj tu* pn…ĺdiŇčan pńßiju qnlńßaŇčan soto …üomo k…ônjatta. ńßaŇčan nija uńßu…ĺu mniq k ¶ka ka…ĺi kiswańßili duŇčus nija ka 'mt…ĺawańß', smataŇč spuda ńßija madas …ĺdax mt…ĺawańß ńßiti qu…ĺi qnlńßaŇčan. uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta mnniq nai…ĺobi na pjasan tuk ¶ka saint ma…ĺj muja, lŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** mniq qmpańß k…ônja saŇčj…ô giŇčńßaŇč. snp…ôjańß mnńßdu mujas pjasan tuk ¶ka daw, wada mqu…ĺi ami…ĺika pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč amńß…ô…ĺst ¶oll…ôg…ô mujas smluńßaj k…ô…üaj, s…ô…üi mi s…ôńßu sw…ô. snp…ôjańß mnńßdu mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč amńß…ô…ĺst ¶oll…ôg…ô tb…ĺinańß mijańß k…ônja, wada pńßiju ¶uko pnjańßan pnwalaŇč na ko…üjo wilńßam k…ônja limit…ôd. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, …ĺmi…ĺińß ¶ ¶ŇčtaŇč k…ônja a*…ĺika min…üoku …ĺj…ônmoŇč muda s…ôŇčkjo soto mi wada ini baka, mńßdu k…ônja a*…ĺika min…üoku …ĺj…ônmoŇč qnbsjaqan ** knkawas qmlańßaŇč qnlńßaŇčan. kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč, Ňčalan k…ônja a*…ĺika min…üoku …ĺj…ônmoŇč ¶usi. uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta u wada ńßlijan mniq ijax kŇčkawas **** s…ôŇčkjo soto ¶ida, dmudul kŇčkawas ****-**** k…ônja qn…ĺqilan, qn…ĺqilan niji u ja baj **** ńßiji s…ôdiq ka wada mńßuqil, b…ôtaq so ini pnduŇčus psbalaj ka q ¶ańßu…ĺ min…üoku k…ônja. kŇčkawas ****das **, kwo ¶i siŇčs ńßojiŇč u wada malax pqu…ĺi uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta kŇčkawas **** idas **, kwo ¶i siŇčs ńßojiŇč u wada malax pqu…ĺi uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta na ńßmili ¶umi tb…ĺinańß ss…ôdiq. kwo ¶i siŇčs ńßojiŇč k…ônsakwan *atub…ônsoda mniq k ¶ka *patas …ĺmŇčaw, s…ôńßu k…ônja ini s…ĺuwa psupu qmpańß wada madas 'k…ĺinańß mq…ĺiqu' ka uuda niji. pkla ka…ĺi ka ńßija, nasi niqan knou ¶Ňč ¶ju ka p ¶…ĺiju pa, …ĺŇčijun nija ka bijax muda mntxan tmiju kokoso duŇčan. kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta u wada mbijax maŇčal **.**% ńßjo nija mi wada na ini baka ka pnsuŇč ńßija …ĺaila odiŇčga, wada mntu* soto k…ônja ka uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta.
S.FORM: Uhuru Kenyatta Mntucing hngkawas 1961 idas 10 jiyax 26 ka Uhuru Kenyatta ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Kenya ta sayang o kiya ka Uhuru Kenyatta, pnaah hngkawas 2013 idas 4 jiyax 9 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Uhuru Kenyatta = Kndusan Uhuru Kenyatta ka laqi na Kenya muwaya balay tu1 pnrdingan phiyu qnlhangan soto Jomo Kenyatta. Hangan niya Uhuru mniq kcka kari Kiswahili dungus niya ka 'Mtrawah', smatang spuda hiya madas rdax mtrawah hiti quri qnlhangan. Uhuru Kenyatta mnniq Nairobi na Pyasan Tukcka Saint Mary muya, lngkawas 1979 dhuq kngkawas 1980 mniq qmpah Kenya Sangyey Ginghang. Snpeyyah mnhdu muyas pyasan tukcka daw, wada mquri Amirika Pyasan Tubeyhing Amherst College muyas smluhay keyjay, seyji mi seyhu swey. Snpeyyah mnhdu muyas pyasan Tubeyhing Amherst College tbrinah miyah Kenya, wada phiyu cuko pnyahan pnwalang na kojyo Wilham Kenya Limited. Kngkawas 2002 cida, rmirih ccngtang Kenya Afrika Minjoku Ryeynmong muda seyngkyo soto mi wada ini baka, mhdu Kenya Afrika Minjoku Ryeynmong qnbsyaqan 40 knkawas qmlahang qnlhangan. Kngkawas 2005 prading, ngalan Kenya Afrika Minjoku Ryeynmong cusi. Uhuru Kenyatta u wada hliyan mniq iyax kngkawas 2007 seyngkyo soto cida, dmudul kngkawas 2007-2008 Kenya Qnrqilan, qnrqilan niyi u ya bay 1300 hiyi sediq ka wada mhuqil, beytaq so ini pndungus psbalay ka qcahur minjoku Kenya. Kngkawas 2014das 12, Kwoci Sings Hoying u wada malax pquri Uhuru Kenyatta Kngkawas 2014 idas 12, Kwoci Sings Hoying u wada malax pquri Uhuru Kenyatta na hmili Cumi Tbrinah Ssediq. Kwoci Sings Hoying keynsakwan Fatubensoda mniq kcka 1patas rmngaw, seyhu Kenya ini sruwa psupu qmpah wada madas 'Krinah Mqriqu' ka uuda niyi. Pkla kari ka hiya, nasi niqan knou cngcyu ka pcriyu pa, rngiyun niya ka biyax muda mntxan tmiyu kokoso dungan. Kngkawas 2013 idas 3 cida, Uhuru Kenyatta u wada mbiyax mangal 50.07% hyo niya mi wada na ini baka ka pnsung hiya Raila Odingga, wada mntu4 soto Kenya ka Uhuru Kenyatta.

s…ôdiq ka wada mńßuqil, b…ôtaq so ini pnduŇčus psbalaj ka q ¶ańßu…ĺ min…üoku k…ônja. kŇčkawas ****das **, kwo ¶i siŇčs ńßojiŇč u wada malax pqu…ĺi uńßu…ĺu k…ônjatta kŇčkawas **** idas **, kwo ¶i siŇčs
